title: Minimum One Bit Operations to Make Integers Zero
titleCn: 使整数变为 0 的最少操作次数

testcases.input: n = 3 Output: 2 Explanation: The binary representation of 3 is "11". "11" -> "01" with the 2nd operation since the 0th bit is 1. "01" -> "00" with the 1st operation.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The binary representation of 3 is "11". "11" -> "01" with the 2nd operation since the 0th bit is 1. "01" -> "00" with the 1st operation.

testcases.input: n = 6 Output: 4 Explanation: The binary representation of 6 is "110". "110" -> "010" with the 2nd operation since the 1st bit is 1 and 0th through 0th bits are 0. "010" -> "011" with the 1st operation. "011" -> "001" with the 2nd operation since the 0th bit is 1. "001" -> "000" with the 1st operation.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The binary representation of 6 is "110". "110" -> "010" with the 2nd operation since the 1st bit is 1 and 0th through 0th bits are 0. "010" -> "011" with the 1st operation. "011" -> "001" with the 2nd operation since the 0th bit is 1. "001" -> "000" with the 1st operation.
